name: Project AWHC-88 Atmospheric Condenser Industrial Bill of Materials

structural_containment_and_heavy_metallu.specification: Certified ISO 10993 Long-Term Bio-Inert Matrix, Extruded Sheet stock, High Thermal Insulation Boundary
structural_containment_and_heavy_metallu.purpose: Primary raw substrate for CNC micro-machining and printing the external AWHC-01 intake chassis and AWHC-02 insulating shell to block desert heat

structural_containment_and_heavy_metallu.item: Implant-Grade Titanium Alloy Powder (Ti6Al4V ELI Grade 23)
structural_containment_and_heavy_metallu.specification: Extra Low Interstitial, Gas Atomized Spherical Powder, ASTM F136 Standard
structural_containment_and_heavy_metallu.purpose: Raw metal substrate used to DMLS print the internal 1mm fluid tracks and the fine-gauge water extraction lips within the AWHC-03 classifier

thermodynamic_and_solid_state_energy_rec.specification: P-type and N-type Semiconductor Elements, High-Density Doping for Sharp Localized Temperature Depression down to 0C
thermodynamic_and_solid_state_energy_rec.purpose: Populates the concentric inner sleeve of the AWHC-02 condensation throat to drive the active 4.0C dew-point chill line

thermodynamic_and_solid_state_energy_rec.item: Piezoelectric PVDF High-Polymer Metallized Film Sheets
thermodynamic_and_solid_state_energy_rec.specification: Thickness: 28 microns, Poling Strain Vector d33: 33 pC/N, High-Temperature Metallized Aluminum Contact Pads
thermodynamic_and_solid_state_energy_rec.purpose: Constructs the secondary acoustic noise recovery and structural vibration dampening rings behind the internal titanium liners

thermodynamic_and_solid_state_energy_rec.specification: 99.99% Pure High-Conductivity Copper, Thickness: 0.5mm, Dead-Soft Temper Standard
thermodynamic_and_solid_state_energy_rec.purpose: Forms the positive and negative current collection tracks for balancing Peltier inputs and harvesting Seebeck micro-currents

hermetic_hydraulic_seals_and_micro_filte.specification: Self-Energizing Profile, Outer Diameter: 80.0mm, Section Cross-Thickness: 1.8mm
hermetic_hydraulic_seals_and_micro_filte.purpose: Establishes a permanent gas-tight metallic compression seal at the primary inter-module titanium flange splits

hermetic_hydraulic_seals_and_micro_filte.specification: Durometer Hardness: 80A, Certified Operating Temperature Range: -60C to 200C
hermetic_hydraulic_seals_and_micro_filte.purpose: Provides flexible, air-tight secondary backup sealing bounds inside the outer coaxial counter-current pre-cooling jackets

hermetic_hydraulic_seals_and_micro_filte.specification: Porosity: 2 microns, Food-Grade Certified, High-Temperature Diffusion-Bonded Matrix Discs
hermetic_hydraulic_seals_and_micro_filte.purpose: Positioned inside the AWHC-01 air intake plenum entrance mouth to completely trap micro-dust and sand particles before fluid compression
